# E2 — Agent Consolidation

Reduce the agent squad from 9 to 6 by merging implementer+tester into developer, removing refactorer, folding documenter into orchestrator, and adding the review feedback loop.

## Stories

| ID | Title | Priority | Depends On |
|----|-------|----------|------------|
| TH1.E2.US1 | Create developer agent | P1 | TH1.E1.US1 |
| TH1.E2.US2 | Add review feedback loop | P1 | TH1.E2.US1 |
| TH1.E2.US3 | Remove refactorer agent | P2 | TH1.E2.US1 |
| TH1.E2.US4 | Fold documenter into orchestrator | P3 | TH1.E2.US1 |
